depth_pass: A2 Depth Pass 4 — State Addenda Structured Promotion

overrides.override_summary: Highest interest rate allowed by law is 10% annually
overrides.why_it_matters: Caps FPI loan interest rates at 10% vs 10.5% disclosed rate

overrides.override_summary: General release waiver at renewal/transfer is void under CA Corporations Code §31512
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee cannot be forced to waive franchise law claims at renewal or transfer

overrides.override_summary: Termination upon bankruptcy may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Standard protection; bankruptcy termination provision limited

overrides.override_summary: FLA requires venue in Jackson County, MO; California Business and Professions Code §20040.5 provides that forum selection clause restricting venue to non-California forum is void for claims arising under California Franchise Relations Act
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may sue in California for state franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: California law governs claims arising under CA Franchise Investment Law and Franchise Relations Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Missouri choice of law overridden for CA-specific franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act, §705/41 governs; in event of conflict with FLA, Illinois law controls
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois franchisees protected by Illinois law for claims under Illinois Act

overrides.override_summary: No release, assignment, novation, waiver that deprives franchisee of Illinois Act rights, except bona fide settlements
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot waive Illinois franchise law protections at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Act §705/41 governs; jurisdiction and venue in Illinois for Illinois Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MO choice of law overridden for Illinois franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: General release not required as condition of renewal/transfer/other unless claims arose prior to signing; MDFRDA claims not waivable
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot condition renewal/transfer on release of MD franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may sue in Maryland for MD franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: No forced travel to Missouri for MD-law claims

overrides.override_summary: Any provision requiring prospective franchisee to assent to release of franchise law claims is void
overrides.why_it_matters: MD-specific termination protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: No termination prior to expiration except for good cause; 30-day written notice and opportunity to cure required
overrides.why_it_matters: Good-cause termination standard with cure period; stronger franchisee protection than base FLA

overrides.override_summary: Must fairly compensate franchisee by repurchase or other means for FMV of inventory, supplies, equipment, fixtures on non-renewal (conditions apply)
overrides.why_it_matters: Financial protection upon non-renewal if term <5 years and restricted from continuing similar business

overrides.override_summary: Cannot refuse transfer except for good cause (qualifications, competition, compliance, payment)
overrides.why_it_matters: Transfer approval cannot be unreasonably withheld

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
overrides.why_it_matters: Michigan franchisees litigate in Michigan

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure; 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Much longer notice/cure periods than base FLA's 15 days

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete limited to 2 years post-termination within area of territory per Minn. Rule 2860.4400(J)
overrides.why_it_matters: Minnesota law limits noncompete scope

overrides.override_summary: Franchisor cannot require release of claims under Minnesota Franchise Act as condition of renewal or transfer
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law claims preserved at renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: MN Franchise Act governs MN-law claims; MN Stat §80C.21 rights not abrogated
overrides.why_it_matters: Minnesota law overrides Missouri for franchise-specific claims

overrides.override_summary: Minn. Stat §80C.21 provides jurisdiction in MN courts for MN claims
overrides.why_it_matters: No forced litigation in Missouri for MN franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Must give 90 days prior written notice of termination, with 60 days to cure
overrides.why_it_matters: NY requires longer notice and cure than base FLA

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete cannot exceed 2 years per NY GBL Article 33
overrides.why_it_matters: NY limits noncompete duration

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring action in NY for NY GBL Article 33 claims
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisees can litigate in NY

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete unenforceable under ND law per NDCC §9-08-06
overrides.why_it_matters: No post-term noncompete for ND franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require release of claims under ND Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchise claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: ND courts have jurisdiction for ND franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: No forced travel to Missouri

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs ND franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Missouri choice of law overridden

overrides.override_summary: Section 19-28.1-14 of RI Franchise Investment Act applies to disputes in RI
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchisees may litigate in RI

overrides.override_summary: VA Retail Franchising Act §13.1-564 anti-fraud protections apply
overrides.why_it_matters: VA anti-fraud protections cannot be waived

overrides.override_summary: Release is void if it requires waiver of WA Franchise Investment Protection Act claims; WA franchisees may not be required to waive rights under RCW 19.100
overrides.why_it_matters: Strong protection against forced release of WA franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete subject to WA state law limitations; unreasonable restrictions void
overrides.why_it_matters: WA may limit or void noncompete provisions

overrides.override_summary: Must comply with WA Franchise Investment Protection Act termination requirements
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional termination protections for WA franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Forum selection in WA for WA franchise law claims; cannot require out-of-state litigation
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchisees litigate in WA

overrides.override_summary: Wisconsin Fair Dealership Law §§135.01-135.07 requires good cause, 90-day notice, and 60-day cure for termination, cancellation, or non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Strong termination protections; good cause required with extended notice/cure

overrides.override_summary: WI Fair Dealership Law governs WI franchise relationships
overrides.why_it_matters: WI law protections apply regardless of FLA choice-of-law

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require waiver of WI Fair Dealership Law rights
overrides.why_it_matters: WI franchise law claims preserved at renewal/transfer
